---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a Relayna capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Please read this first

- Have you searched existing issues for similar requests?
- Have you checked whether the current SDK or Studio docs already cover this?

### Affected area

Mark all that apply:

- [ ] SDK
- [ ] Studio backend
- [ ] Studio frontend
- [ ] RabbitMQ topology / publishing / consuming
- [ ] Redis status / history / DLQ storage
- [ ] Workflow topology
- [ ] Observability / execution graphs
- [ ] MCP
- [ ] Packaging / installation
- [ ] Documentation

### Describe the feature

What should Relayna support?

### Use case

What problem does this solve? Include a realistic example or workflow.

### Proposed behavior

Describe the desired API, route, UI behavior, configuration, or operational
flow if you have one in mind.

### Compatibility considerations

Would this change public SDK imports, task/status/workflow contracts, route
responses, Redis data, RabbitMQ topology, serialized state, or deployment
configuration?

### Alternatives considered

What workarounds or other designs have you considered?
